EmailTemplate.name: uDC Account Approved
EmailTemplate.subject: Account Approved
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Account Approved
Dear {!Account.Account_POC_Firstname__c},
Congratulations, your account information has been verified and you now have full access to the uDesign® Cloud and Desktop digital orthodontic platforms. You may now proceed with adding users to your account, placing orders for uAssist Treatment planning assistance, export STLs for in-office printing, and order aligners or retainers from uLab's US-based manufacturing facility.
Let us know how we can help get you started!
Sincerely, Your uLab Team
We're here to help. Call +1 (866)-900-8522 or Email support@ulabsystems.com
Privacy Policy | Terms of Use | ulabsystems.com
© 2026 uLab Systems, Inc. All Rights Reserved. uLab Systems, uSmile, uAssist and uView are trademarks and uLab and uDesign are registered trademarks of uLab Systems, Inc.
